overall.description: First-person exploration of a gothic wizarding dormitory with vaulted stone ceilings and four-poster beds, transitioning through ornate brick corridors with stained glass skylights. The player character walks through the dimly lit atmospheric space, briefly encountering other robed figures in the hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular gothic dormitory with vaulted ceilings

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular dormitory room observing the four-poster beds and stone architecture

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed gothic architecture
large circular stained glass window at the apex of the ceiling
ornate beds with dark wood frames and green draped curtains
tall cylindrical metal cage on a stone pedestal in the room's center
ornate wall-mounted lanterns providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The player explores a large circular gothic dormitory with high vaulted stone ceilings and a central stained glass skylight. The room contains multiple four-poster beds with green drapery, a central metal cage structure, and warm wall sconces contrasting with the cool stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: doorway transition between dormitory and corridor

events.description: opens the heavy wooden door and steps from the dormitory into the narrow brick corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching and opening the ornate wooden door to exit the dormitory

entered.detail: heavy dark wood door with decorative glass panels and metal scrollwork
rough stone brick walls with arched architecture
ornate dark metal railings with decorative patterns

segments.scene_description: The player approaches an ornate wooden door with glass panels, opens it, and steps through into a narrow brick corridor. The scene transitions from the spacious dormitory to the enclosed hallway with metal railings and rough stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered brick corridor with stained glass ceiling panels

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor passing by other robed figures standing near the railing

notable_agents.action: two robed figures standing near the railing on the left side of the corridor

entered.detail: green-tinted stained glass panels set into the arched ceiling
lit wall-mounted lanterns with glass enclosures

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow brick corridor illuminated by wall lanterns and green-tinted stained glass skylights. Two robed NPCs stand near the railing on the left as the camera moves deeper into the atmospheric hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular dormitory chamber with tapestries and mirrors

events.description: opens the wooden door and re-enters the dormitory from the corridor

agents.ego_description: re-entering the dormitory through the door and exploring the side with wall decorations

entered.detail: tall freestanding oval mirror with dark wooden frame
decorative woven wall hangings with intricate patterns

segments.scene_description: The player opens the wooden door and steps back into the spacious dormitory, now exploring the side featuring wall tapestries and a large oval mirror. The circular room's stone architecture and green-draped beds are visible from a new angle as the camera moves through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered brick corridor with arched ceilings

events.description: exits the dormitory again into the brick corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the door and exiting back into the corridor to continue exploration

entered.detail: rough stone brick walls with arched doorways
ornate dark metal railings lining both sides of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player exits the dormitory once more into the narrow brick corridor, walking along the patterned floor beneath the green glass skylights. The corridor extends ahead with wall-mounted lanterns and metal railings lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that weaves between a spacious gothic dormitory and a narrow, atmospheric brick corridor. It begins by exploring the circular dormitory's high vaulted ceilings and green-draped four-poster beds before moving toward an ornate wooden door. As the door opens, the scene shifts from the open room into a confined hallway illuminated by wall lanterns and green-tinted stained glass skylights, passing two robed figures standing by a metal railing. The camera then doubles back through the wooden door to reveal a different section of the dormitory featuring wall tapestries and a large oval mirror, before finally exiting once more into the patterned brick corridor as it extends forward under the glow of the skylights.
